subcodes.first_line: Praise be to God Who hath made known unto us His Cause, taught us of His Manifestation, guided us unto His Path, and unveiled unto us that which [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: الحمد لله الذی عرفنا امره و علمنا ظهوره و هدانا الی صراطه و کشف لنا ما
subcodes.subjects: @consorting with all; being kind; loving to all, @praise and encouragement, @transcendence; unknowability of God, @wisdom [hikmat], @permission for visit; pilgrimage, @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution
